cpu: AMD A10-5750M APU with Radeon HD Graphics
notes:
On game startup, an error message pops up: "Unable to initialize your audio hardware". But, upon clicking "ok" the game starts just fine, with audio fully working.
Played through the whole game, didn't have any issues.
title: Unavowed

notes: Per https://steamcommunity.com/app/336140/discussions/0/1649919326314255993/ some scenes weren't shaded correctly using the game's default OpenGL renderer. To fix, select "Launch Configuration Tool" when when running the game and choose the "Direct3D 9" driver. Save this ("Save and Run" doesn't work) and exit, then run the game. Works perfectly after that.
title: Unavowed

notes:
Need to run the configuration tool first and make sure that DirectX 9 is selected as a driver. After that the game runs perfectly. 

Sometimes I get a crash to desktop after alt-tabbing too much, but it is very rare and after many hours playing. Shouldn't happen to most people.
title: Unavowed
